description_long: This is an adult woman with a slender build, standing with arms extended horizontally in a T-pose. She is dressed in a casual, urban outfit consisting of a long-sleeved button-up shirt layered over a top, paired with fitted pants and lace-up shoes. Her hair is long and straight, reaching past her shoulders, and is parted to one side. The facial features are realistic, with a neutral expression and natural proportions. The clothing appears comfortable and suitable for everyday city environments, with subtle texturing visible on the shirt and pants. No accessories or carried objects are visible, and the overall appearance is clean and modern.
description: A casually dressed adult woman stands in a T-pose, wearing a long-sleeved shirt, fitted pants, and lace-up shoes, with long straight hair and a realistic urban appearance.
description_view_0: Front view shows the woman's face, layered shirt, fitted pants, and lace-up shoes, with arms extended horizontally.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of her face, the length of her hair, and the layered effect of her shirt and top.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of her head, the full length of her hair, and the back of her shirt and pants.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the profile, hair, and the side seam of her clothing.
attribute_clothing_type: casual button-up shirt over a top and fitted pants
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms extended horizontally
attribute_hairstyle: long straight hair parted to one side
